title: SQL Basics
description: Learn databases, tables, SQL queries, CRUD operations, joins, constraints, aggregate functions, subqueries, and normalization.

content.text: A Database Management System (DBMS) is a software that allows creation, definition and manipulation of database. RDBMS stands for Relational Database Management System.
A table is a collection of related data held in a structured format within a database. It consists of columns, and rows.
A JOIN clause is used to combine rows from two or more tables, based on a related column between them.
